subcodes.first_line: Goodly praise and noble commendation befit and beseem the court of the true friends of God, who have freed themselves from self and turned unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر خوب و ثنای مرغوب بساط اولیای حق را لایق و سزاست که از خود رستند و بحق
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
